title: Academic Programs
description: An offering by an institution that represents a combination of courses and requirements leading to a degree, diploma, or certificate for a defined set of majors, minors, or concentrations.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of an academic program.

title.title: Title
title.description: The full name of an academic program.

description.title: Description
description.description: The description of an academic program.

code.title: Code
code.description: A code that identifies an academic program.

authorizing.title: Authorizing
authorizing.description: The institutional unit that authorizes the academic program.

oneOf.title: institution
oneOf.description: The institution that authorizes the academic program.

institution.title: Institution
institution.description: The institution that authorizes the academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Institution.

oneOf.title: institutionalUnit
oneOf.description: The institutional unit that authorizes the academic program.

institutionalUnit.title: Institutional Unit
institutionalUnit.description: The institutional unit that authorizes the academic program, typically a school or college within the institution.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Institutional Unit.

oneOf.title: organization
oneOf.description: The organization that authorizes the academic program.

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: The organization that authorizes the academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Organization.

programOwners.title: Program Owners
programOwners.description: The owners of the academic program.

items.title: Program Owners
items.description: The owners of the academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Program Owners.

sites.title: Sites
sites.description: The sites (campuses) the program is offered at

items.title: Sites
items.description: The sites (campuses) the program is offered at

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Sites.

academicLevel.title: Academic Level
academicLevel.description: The level of academic progress that is associated with an academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Academic Level.

credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.description: The academic credentials that can be awarded for completing an academic program.

items.title: Credentials
items.description: The academic credentials that can be awarded for completing an academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Credentials.

disciplines.title: Discipline
disciplines.description: The academic disciplines offered as part of an academic program.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.description: An academic discipline associated with the academic program.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Discipline.

subdisciplines.title: Subdisciplines
subdisciplines.description: A list of academic disciplines that are subordinate to the discipline.

subdiscipline.title: Sub-discipline
subdiscipline.description: An academic discipline that is subordinate to the discipline.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Sub-discipline.

status.title: Status
status.description: The status of an academic program.

startOn.title: Start Date
startOn.description: The date that an academic program starts.

endOn.title: End Date
endOn.description: The date that an academic program ends.
